entity.summary: Blast order-book decentralized exchange for spot and futures trading, preserved through substantial cumulative exchange volume but without sufficient recent activity evidence for an active classification.
entity.notes: Current registry data preserves Blitz AMM as a Blast order-book exchange and reports roughly $140 million in cumulative DEX volume. The reviewed profile does not expose strong recent volume or liquidity metrics, and a stable first-party application URL was not recovered. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead.

evidence.title: Blitz AMM protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Blitz AMM as a Blast order-book exchange for spot and futures trading.

evidence.title: Blitz AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves the Blitz AMM identity and Blast chain association.

evidence.title: Blitz AMM cumulative volume record
evidence.notes: Substantial cumulative DEX volume remains documented, but recent activity evidence is insufficient, supporting a limited classification.
